title: tmuxcc structured window layout
description: Structured layout representation for the tmuxcc wire protocol. The session-proxy parses tmux south-side layout strings and converts them into this transport-agnostic tree. Layout strings NEVER appear on the wire.

Rect.description: A rectangle in terminal-cell coordinates, origin at top-left of the tmux client area.

LayoutPane.description: A leaf node in the layout tree: a single pane occupying a rectangle.

LayoutHSplit.description: A horizontal split node: children are arranged side-by-side (left to right). Corresponds to tmux's '[…]' horizontal notation, expressed semantically.

children.description: Child layout nodes arranged left to right.

LayoutVSplit.description: A vertical split node: children are stacked top-to-bottom. Corresponds to tmux's '{…}' vertical notation, expressed semantically.

children.description: Child layout nodes stacked top to bottom.

LayoutNode.description: Any node in the layout tree. Discriminate on `kind`: "pane", "hsplit", or "vsplit".

WindowLayout.description: The complete layout for a single window: a tree rooted at one LayoutNode, plus the window's total dimensions.

cols.description: Total width of the window in columns.

rows.description: Total height of the window in rows.
